global.description: The ad features a warm orange gradient background with abstract shapes and bold text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new season with a call to action for rewards.

elements.label: orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Several overlapping abstract shapes in light tones, including circles and rectangles, are centered in the ad.

elements.label: rectangular shape
elements.description: A prominent rectangular shape in a light color is positioned centrally, suggesting a focal point.

elements.label: smaller shapes
elements.description: Smaller abstract shapes in light colors are scattered around the main subject, adding visual interest.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: Additional smaller shapes complement the design, enhancing the overall composition.

elements.label: main text
elements.description: The text 'A new season drops' is bold and centrally placed, conveying the main message clearly.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Claim reward' is prominently displayed in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape that adds a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: The headline text 'new season drops' is bold and eye-catching, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' is displayed at the top left, representing the brand identity.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The label 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, promoting new season drops.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is prominently displayed.
